context: Tests whether the agent implements the correct ACOS-based bid adjustment thresholds, multipliers, data minimums, bid clamping, and change filtering as specified in the marketplace advertising skill, plus exponential backoff for API rate limiting.

checklist.name: High ACOS threshold 1.2x
checklist.description: Bid reduction is triggered when currentAcos exceeds targetAcos multiplied by 1.2

checklist.name: Bid reduction multiplier 0.85
checklist.description: When ACOS is too high, the bid is reduced by multiplying by 0.85 (a 15% reduction)

checklist.name: Low ACOS threshold 0.8x
checklist.description: Bid increase is triggered when currentAcos is below targetAcos multiplied by 0.8

checklist.name: Bid increase multiplier 1.10
checklist.description: When ACOS is very low, the bid is increased by multiplying by 1.10 (a 10% increase)

checklist.name: Impression threshold for increase
checklist.description: Bid increase is only applied when impressions exceed 1000 (in addition to the low ACOS check)

checklist.name: Minimum 10 clicks threshold
checklist.description: Keywords with fewer than 10 clicks are skipped / excluded from optimization (insufficient data)

checklist.name: Bid floor $0.10
checklist.description: Bids are clamped to a minimum of $0.10 after adjustment

checklist.name: Bid ceiling $10.00
checklist.description: Bids are clamped to a maximum of $10.00 after adjustment

checklist.name: Change threshold $0.01
checklist.description: Bid updates are only submitted when the absolute change in bid is greater than $0.01

checklist.name: Exponential backoff
checklist.description: API calls include retry logic with exponential backoff (increasing delays between retries, not fixed-interval polling)

checklist.name: TARGET_ACOS env var
checklist.description: Reads target ACOS from process.env.TARGET_ACOS with a default fallback of 0.30

checklist.name: 30-day performance window
checklist.description: Bid decisions are based on 30-day performance data (not 7-day or other windows)
